data.body: Decision log (var 15): _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO -> REMOVE (dead never-set private flag; existing gc.auto value-check already avoids the redundant git-config call). --- CORE STORE CLUSTER COMPLETE (vars 1-15). Patterns established: secrets->keep(env); tuning settings->config-key + REBAR_<KEY> env override + alias; dead/internal/shell-out->remove.
